'''Kuat''' was the [[Color/Legends|orange]]-silver primary of the [[Kuat system/Legends|Kuat system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by six [[Planet/Legends|planets]], two of which were habitable.

==History==
During the [[Taking of Kuat]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] [[Aurora (Star Dreadnought)|''Aurora'']] and ''[[Stellar Halo]]'' streaked into the star.<ref name="TEGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>
